item.name: Lakeskipper
item.description:
This small freshwater fish is aptly named for its unique, prancing movement across the bottom of Bronze Lake.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Known─and named─for its unique style of swimming, this freshwater fish skips rapidly from rock to rock as it traverses the lake floor. It does this not for the sheer joy of living, but to inflict a swift, unpredictable death upon the smaller wavekin that it hunts for food.
